intro: Hey! I'm Indigo or Indi. Welcome to my personal corner of the internet—feel free to explore my interests, music taste, and socials!

sections.title: Who Am I
sections.content: I'm a 17-year-old male (He/Him) and I'm gynosexual. My timezone is PST and my birthday is December 20th. I also have 2 Shih Tzu dogs named Zuko and Azula (yes they're named after the avatar characters)

sections.title: What I Do
sections.content: I enjoy gaming, listening to music, and learning new things like playing guitar. I also like working on websites and sometimes discord bots as well, all of its for fun and its a learning process for me.

sections.title: Interests & Hobbies
items: Manhwa: Solo Max Level Newbie, I Obtained a Mythic Item, Logging 10,000 Years into the Future (I like OP MC manhwa)
Games: Rocket League, Minecraft, Roblox, Terraria, Tmod Loader, Satisfactory
YouTubers: The Boys, Sauce Eddie, Narrator, Sam and Colby, Big Puffer, Markiplier, Clooless Podcast, Eric Parker, Joko, Let's Game It Out, DanTDM, DangerouslyFunny
Music: John Michael Howell, Fall Out Boy, Twenty One Pilots, The Weeknd, Arctic Monkeys, Imagine Dragons, Chase Atlantic, Maroon 5, Bastille
